title: Xinyu Innovation — Startup Years
titleCn: 心域创新 · 创业岁月
body:
Founded and scaled a custom apparel platform in Shenzhen, pivoting from high-end bespoke designs to on-demand print customization. Served over 100,000 customers bringing their creative visions to life — and built the entire end-to-end system myself.

### What I built

- Java backend on SSH framework
- Web apps with Vue and Angular
- T-shirt design tool and word cloud generator
- E-commerce iOS app
- Full ordering, fulfillment, logistics, and customer service pipeline

Four roles on my LinkedIn for the same company — founder, PM, backend dev, frontend dev, iOS dev. Startup life means your title is "whatever needs doing right now."

---

### 这段经历

在深圳从零开始做了一个定制服装平台，从高端定制设计起步，后来转型做按需印花，前后服务了十万多客户。整个系统都是我一个人搭的——Java 后端、Vue 和 Angular 的前端、T恤设计工具、词云生成器、iOS 电商 App，从下单到生产到物流到客服，全链路一手包办。

LinkedIn 上同一家公司挂了四个职位。创业嘛，什么缺人你就是什么。
